appliedUpdates.description: Created validation directory structure for partner-management milestone scrutiny reviews

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance on navigation patterns: prefer router.navigate from useRouter hook over window.location.href for client-side navigation. Include example code showing proper TanStack Router navigation pattern.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All three partner features (partner-list-page, partner-detail-page, partner-create-form) used window.location.href for navigation. Workers attempted to use router.navigate but faced issues with pattern not found. Clear documentation would prevent this inconsistency.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document TanStack Router file-based routing limitation with dot notation (e.g., partners.new.tsx). Route tree auto-generation doesn't pick up files with dots in names. Recommend using $ notation (partners/$new.tsx) or manual route tree updates.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: createPartner handoff documented: 'The route tree auto-generation didn't pick up the new /partners/new route automatically'. Workers had to manually edit routeTree.gen.ts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document responsive data table pattern with mobile card view. Include CSS media query approach for switching between table and card layouts at 640px breakpoint.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: partner-list-page implements elegant responsive pattern: desktop table with columns, mobile card view showing key fields. This pattern should be reused for interviews and assessments lists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document server-side pagination pattern using Prisma skip/take with total count query. Include input validation for page and pageSize parameters.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: getPartners in app/server/partners.ts implements clean pagination pattern: count for total, findMany with skip/take for data. Validates pageSize maximum (100) to prevent abuse.

rejectedObservations.observation: Consider adding useRouter from @tanstack/react-router for navigation
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in AGENTS.md as a desirable pattern, just needs clearer explicit guidance

rejectedObservations.observation: Inline CSS-in-JS styles could be migrated to Tailwind classes
rejectedObservations.reason: non-blocking style preference issue - both approaches work and this is documented as acceptable in project conventions
